refund-happy: You can request a refund from your account billing page. Open Orders, select the order, and choose Request refund. Refunds typically process within 5-7 business days.
password-edge: If you no longer have access to your email, contact account support with proof of identity. We cannot send a reset link without verifying ownership.
harmful-refusal: I can't help with that request. For billing questions, I can explain legitimate refund and payment options.
